title: BodyZone
description: Definition of a single targetable body zone for combat damage resolution.

hit_weight.description: Relative probability of being hit. All zones in a body sum to 1.0 when normalised.

wound_thresholds.description: Damage values (post-mitigation) that trigger each wound severity level.

critical_effects.description: Special effects triggered at or above 'severe' wound on this zone.

pain_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to pain generated by wounds on this zone.

blocks_reach_if_wounded.description: If true, a wound of severity >= 'wound' disables use of items held in this limb.

tissue_layers.description: Ordered tissue stack from outermost (skin) to innermost (organ). When present, tissue penetration model supersedes wound_thresholds for severity derivation.

type.description: Tissue type. Determines wound severity contribution and special flags.

yield_strength.description: Material yield strength. resistance = yield_strength × thickness_mm, compared to pressure = remaining_momentum / contact_area_cm2.

blunt_factor.description: Fraction of remaining momentum that propagates as blunt shock when this layer stops physical penetration.

fracture_threshold.description: Bone only. If accumulated blunt momentum reaching this layer >= fracture_threshold, the bone fractures (severe wound flag). Absent on non-bone layers.

organ_id.description: Organ only. References an organ in the body_plan's organs array. If reached via physical penetration, organ damage is recorded.

vital.description: Organ only. If true, penetrating this organ triggers an immediate death effect.
